title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind announces Gemini 3 with upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The session showcases new agentic workflows and demos available in Vertex AI for developers to build and scale applications.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session announces Gemini 3 from Google DeepMind, covering upgraded model reasoning, an expanded context window, and enhanced multimodal tool use. It demonstrates new agentic workflows and demos available in Vertex AI. The focus is practical: how developers build and scale applications on these capabilities. Key takeaways center on the combination of stronger reasoning, larger context processing, and multimodal tool use surfaced through Vertex AI.
